summary: H001: Expanded RETRO_RULES with 10+ new rules (heterocycles, N-oxide, acetal, carbamate). Generated 90 molecules via mutate strategy. Docked top 30, best binding energy = -8.405. All 10 top molecules had non-trivial synthesis routes. SA scores all < 6.0 (range 2.0-3.3). QED range 0.82-0.94. Hypothesis partially validated - retro rules expanded but some molecules already had good routes before.
